Functions
fza_ihadss_fnc_canvasDrawLine
Description

Draws a line on the canvas

Parameters
_canvas

The canvas to draw the velocity vector on

_from

First point

_to

Second point

_width

(Optional) Width of the line

_color

(Optional) Color of the line

Returns

Nothing

Examples
[_canvas, [0,0], [1,1]] call fza_ihadss_fnc_flightVelocityVector
Author

mattysmith22
